prompt: Create a polished Remotion finance dashboard with a dark background, an animated revenue line using an SVG path, visible data points, and three compact metric badges.
Create a Remotion climate-risk heatmap with four regions and five forecast columns. Animate cells in sequence and include a clear low-to-high legend.
Create a Remotion healthcare triage queue with three patient cards, visible priority labels, progress bars, and staggered spring entrances.
Create a Remotion AI agent execution trace with four stages: plan, search, patch, verify. Show each stage as an active tool card and animate a progress meter.
Create a Remotion cybersecurity attack path map with five connected nodes, a red path reveal, and a green containment node at the end.
Create a Remotion logistics route map with a curved animated path, four labeled stops, and status chips for ETA, cold chain, and customs risk.
Create a Remotion biology explainer showing a signal cascade from ligand to receptor to kinase to nucleus inside a stylized cell.
Create a Remotion legal contract diff review with three before-and-after rows, red strikeouts on risky clauses, and highlighted safer replacement language.
Create a Remotion creator storyboard grid with four panels: hook, demo, proof, CTA. Use spring entrances and readable panel notes.
Create a Remotion product launch readiness radar with three rings, a rotating sweep line, and four readiness signal labels.
Create a Remotion typewriter micro-lesson about gradient descent with a dark background, a blinking cursor, and a delayed formula card.
Create a Remotion radial progress meter that fills to 74 percent, shows a large center number, and uses an SVG circle stroke reveal.
